title: Vanilla SMP Modpack
description: My pack for playing on vanilla servers without breaking immersion too much!
body:
# Since modrinth doesn't have comments, please write your comments/requests on [my website](https://tsundereunity.com/).

Hello there! if you are in this place, you probably think:
* Wow I really need something like this to play on vanilla servers but all those optimization packs only optimize the game and I have to download tens of mods part by part while I play and as I need and thats irritating
* Holy hecc that must be an ai pack lets see how many malwares are in this pack??
* Haha silly pack go brr!!!
* You are the person reviewing this pack.

And I am here to explain why I made this pack and what can you do with it!
This is a pack made for playing on servers that I gathered by time while playing... which I believe I have 800~ hours on at this point! I might have stuff that you might think is missing and stuff, but by time I removed some stuff to use their vanilla equivelants!

This pack has some features that I need, as example some texture packs that enhance vanilla textures, musics left from old versions with modified versions, REI for crafting recipes I forgot, bobby because hypixel smp has like 6 render distance and more stuff I forgor :')

Heres my world that I play this pack on!
![My smp world that I play on](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66b4b10a5bd1787f2c0610b8eff13498c1a22009.png)
